module.name: configs/index
module.description: Re-exports all config preset factories and legacy config objects from the configs sub-package.

scenarios.name: should re-export createRecommendedConfig from recommended.ts
scenarios.then: the function is available and callable

scenarios.name: should re-export createStrictConfig from strict.ts
scenarios.then: the function is available and callable

scenarios.name: should re-export legacyRecommendedConfig from legacy-recommended.ts
scenarios.then: the legacy config object is available

scenarios.name: should re-export legacyStrictConfig from legacy-strict.ts
scenarios.then: the legacy config object is available
